Interface IMembresiaRepository

Namespace
DAL.Contracts
Assembly
DAL.dll

Repository contract for Membresia (membership plan) entities, extending standard CRUD with plan-specific lookups.

public interface IMembresiaRepository : IGenericRepository<Membresia>

IGenericRepository<Membresia>.Update(Membresia)
IGenericRepository<Membresia>.Remove(Guid)
IGenericRepository<Membresia>.GetById(Guid)
IGenericRepository<Membresia>.GetAll()

Methods

GetByCodigo(int)

Retrieves a membership plan by its sequential numeric code.

Membresia GetByCodigo(int codigo)

Parameters

codigo int

The numeric membership code.

Returns

Membresia

The matching Membresia, or null if not found.

ListarActivas()

Retrieves all membership plans that have Activa = true.

List<Membresia> ListarActivas()

Returns

List<Membresia>

List of active plans; empty list if none.
